name: Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card
exclusions: government payments are capped at 5,000 reward points per statement cycle
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived from second year onwards on minimum spends of Rs 25,00,000 made in the previous year
additionalBenefits: Luxury stay and lifestyle gift card benefits
Priority Pass membership for primary and plus cardholder
Reward points on eligible domestic transactions
UHNI-focused co-branded card with Times Internet

salaried: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank premium card approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank premium card approval criteria
